findings.issue: Impersonation via forged zip files or CEO-relayed prompts
findings.recommended_fix: Implement end-to-end encryption with HMAC signing for all transfers

findings.issue: Courier loop could inadvertently violate Crystal Law 5 through cross-instance ranking mechanics
findings.recommended_fix: Add runtime checks to block leaderboard-like patterns across instances

findings.issue: Missing metadata logging for cross-instance handoffs
findings.recommended_fix: Mandatory governance_events logging with content-hash, timestamp, and signing-instance metadata
